title: Examples / Minimal Substrate / Author Profile
summary: examples/minimal-substrate/author-profile.json is preserved as a raw protocol artifact in the XanaNode canonical substrate.
content:
{
  "id": "example.minimal:person/example-maintainer",
  "name": "Example Maintainer",
  "github": "example-maintainer",
  "website": "https://example.com",
  "branding": {
    "brand_name": "Example Maintainer",
    "tagline": "Example substrate author",
    "primary_media": "example.minimal:media/xananode-icon",
    "icon_media": "example.minimal:media/xananode-icon",
    "primary_color": "#55D6BE",
    "accent_color": "#FF8C00",
    "rights_status": "open-example",
    "license": "CC0-1.0",
    "reason": "Author profiles may carry portable branding that tools can apply to authored substrates."
  },
  "default_rights": "open-example",
  "default_license": "CC0-1.0",
  "default_role": "maintainer"
}
